---
name: Bug report
about: Something broken in Skal (framework, bridge, tooling)
labels: bug
---

**What happened / what did you expect?**

**Minimal reproduction**
<!-- Ideally: JSX snippet or a `bun run new` app + the change that breaks. -->

**Platform**
<!-- macOS / Android / iOS-sim / iOS device / web — plus OS + Flutter version (`flutter --version`). -->

**Logs**
<!-- Boot line (`[skal] init=…`), stack traces, or `flutter run` output. -->
